_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: With 0 of 50 windows producing a ±2+ point move, the coil is statistically dominant and neither the upside breaker (stablecoin growth resuming) nor the downside breaker (ETF exhaustion + funding flush) is visible yet.
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst calls HOLD with low conviction citing divergent liquidity; narrative writer implies an imminent UP move with high conviction citing the August 2024 analog and DXY weakness, a fundamental split on whether the pattern match is trustworthy without liquidity confirmation.
next_move.confirmed_if: stablecoin_growth crosses above 45 AND btc_momentum_30d holds above 50
next_move.invalidated_if: etf_flows drops below 70 AND funding collapses below 35
